name: Cheddar Ham Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 can Whole kernel corn, drained (16 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring the water, potatoes, carrots, celery, onion, salt, and pepper to a boil.
2. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 8-10 minutes or until vegetables are just tender. Remove from the heat; do not drain.
3. Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan, melt the butter. Blend in flour. Add the milk all at once; cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
4. Add cheese and stir until melted.
5. Stir into the undrained vegetables, return large saucepan to the heat. Add corn and ham; heat through, stirring occasionally.
